schedule-1-a:tipsDeduction.label: Tips deduction
schedule-1-a:tipsDeduction.so: Tani waa qodob cusub oo dhimista canshuurta ah, ilaa $25,000, oo loogu talagalay khadarka (tips) aad ka heshay shaqo la xirira khadar.
schedule-1-a:tipsDeduction.en: This is a new deduction, up to $25,000, for qualified tips you earned in a tip-eligible job.

schedule-1-a:overtimeDeduction.label: Overtime deduction
schedule-1-a:overtimeDeduction.so: Tani waa qodob cusub oo dhimista canshuurta ah, oo loogu talagalay mushaharka saacadaha dheeraadka ah (overtime) aad shaqaysay.
schedule-1-a:overtimeDeduction.en: This is a new deduction for qualified overtime pay you earned.

schedule-1-a:carLoanInterestDeduction.label: Car loan interest deduction
schedule-1-a:carLoanInterestDeduction.so: Tani waa qodob cusub oo dhimista canshuurta ah, ilaa $10,000, oo loogu talagalay ribada aad bixisay deynta gaarigaaga.
schedule-1-a:carLoanInterestDeduction.en: This is a new deduction, up to $10,000, for interest you paid on a qualifying vehicle loan.

schedule-1-a:seniorDeduction.label: Senior deduction
schedule-1-a:seniorDeduction.so: Tani waa qodob cusub oo dhimista canshuurta ah oo loogu talagalay dadka da'doodu 65 sano ka weyn tahay.
schedule-1-a:seniorDeduction.en: This is a new deduction for filers age 65 or older.

schedule-1-a:totalDeduction.label: Total additional deductions
schedule-1-a:totalDeduction.so: Tani waa wadarta guud ee dhimisyada cusub ee bogga, oo loo daro Form 1040 sanduuqa 13b.
schedule-1-a:totalDeduction.en: This is the total of all the new deductions on this page, added into Form 1040, line 13b.
